content.problemStatement:
You are given a tree with NNN nodes (numbered 111 through NNN). There are KKK special nodes f1,f2,…,fKf_1,f_2,\ldots,f_Kf1​,f2​,…,fK​ in this tree.

We define d(p,q)d(p,q)d(p,q) to be the number of edges on the unique path from node ppp to node qqq.

You are given a node aaa. For each node bbb from 111 to NNN, find the maximum value of d(a,u)−d(b,u)d(a,u)-d(b,u)d(a,u)−d(b,u) where uuu is a special node, as well as any special node uuu for which that maximum value is attained.


Input Format

The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, KKK, aaa.
The second line contains KKK space-separated integers f1,f2,…,fKf_1,f_2,\ldots,f_Kf1​,f2​,…,fK​.
N−1N-1N−1 lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers uiu_iui​ and viv_ivi​ denoting an edge of the tree.


Output Format
For each test case, print two lines.


In the first line print NNN space-separated integers. For each valid iii, the iii-th integer should be the maximum value of d(a,u)−d(i,u)d(a,u)-d(i,u)d(a,u)−d(i,u) where uuu is a special node.


In the second line print NNN space-separated integers. For each valid iii, the iii-th integer should be any special node uuu for which the maximum of d(a,u)−d(i,u)d(a,u)-d(i,u)d(a,u)−d(i,u) is attained.
constraints: 1≤fi≤N1 \le f_i \le N1≤fi​≤N for each valid iii
fi≠fjf_i \neq f_jfi​=fj​ for each valid iii and jjj such that i≠ji \neq ji=j
1≤ui,vi≤N1 \le u_i,v_i \le N1≤ui​,vi​≤N for each valid iii
the graph described on the input is a tree
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 4⋅1054 \cdot 10^54⋅105
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 400400400
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 400040004000
It holds that ui=iu_i=iui​=i, vi=i+1v_i=i+1vi​=i+1 for each valid iii.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1:  The following picture shows the tree in the first example case with special nodes in bold:

The only special node is the node 222 and a=3a=3a=3. Therefore, the desired maximum is d(a,2)−d(b,2)=d(3,2)−d(b,2)=2−d(b,2)d(a,2)-d(b,2)=d(3,2)-d(b,2)=2-d(b,2)d(a,2)−d(b,2)=d(3,2)−d(b,2)=2−d(b,2) for each node bbb and it is always attained for the special node u=2u=2u=2.
Example case 2: The following picture shows the tree in the second example case with special nodes bolded:

The special nodes are 666, 555 and 888, and a=2a=2a=2. The maximum values of d(a,u)−d(b,u)d(a,u)-d(b,u)d(a,u)−d(b,u) (uuu being a special node) for each bbb are as follows:


b=1b=1b=1: The maximum value of d(2,u)−d(1,u)d(2,u)-d(1,u)d(2,u)−d(1,u) is −1-1−1 and it is achieved for u=5u=5u=5 since d(2,5)−d(1,5)=1−2=−1d(2,5)-d(1,5)=1-2=-1d(2,5)−d(1,5)=1−2=−1.


b=2b=2b=2: The maximum value of d(2,u)−d(2,u)d(2,u)-d(2,u)d(2,u)−d(2,u) is 000 and it is achieved for u=5u=5u=5 since d(2,5)−d(2,5)=1−1=0d(2,5)-d(2,5)=1-1=0d(2,5)−d(2,5)=1−1=0.


b=3b=3b=3: The maximum value of d(2,u)−d(3,u)d(2,u)-d(3,u)d(2,u)−d(3,u) is −1-1−1 and it is achieved for u=5u=5u=5 since d(2,5)−d(3,5)=1−2=−1d(2,5)-d(3,5)=1-2=-1d(2,5)−d(3,5)=1−2=−1.


b=4b=4b=4: The maximum value of d(2,u)−d(4,u)d(2,u)-d(4,u)d(2,u)−d(4,u) is 111 and it is achieved for u=6u=6u=6 since d(2,6)−d(4,6)=2−1=1d(2,6)-d(4,6)=2-1=1d(2,6)−d(4,6)=2−1=1.


b=5b=5b=5: The maximum value of d(2,u)−d(5,u)d(2,u)-d(5,u)d(2,u)−d(5,u) is 111 and it is achieved for u=5u=5u=5 since d(2,5)−d(5,5)=1−0=1d(2,5)-d(5,5)=1-0=1d(2,5)−d(5,5)=1−0=1.


b=6b=6b=6: The maximum value of d(2,u)−d(6,u)d(2,u)-d(6,u)d(2,u)−d(6,u) is 222 and it is achieved for u=6u=6u=6 since d(2,6)−d(6,6)=2−0=2d(2,6)-d(6,6)=2-0=2d(2,6)−d(6,6)=2−0=2.


b=7b=7b=7: The maximum value of d(2,u)−d(7,u)d(2,u)-d(7,u)d(2,u)−d(7,u) is 000 and it is achieved for u=5u=5u=5 since d(2,5)−d(7,5)=1−1=0d(2,5)-d(7,5)=1-1=0d(2,5)−d(7,5)=1−1=0.


b=8b=8b=8: The maximum value of d(2,u)−d(8,u)d(2,u)-d(8,u)d(2,u)−d(8,u) is 222 and it is achieved for u=8u=8u=8 since d(2,8)−d(8,8)=2−0=2d(2,8)-d(8,8)=2-0=2d(2,8)−d(8,8)=2−0=2.
